C:\Users\colli\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\site-packages\cmake\data\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\AlgorithmAssignment3.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\AlgorithmAssignment3.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\AlgorithmAssignment3.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\AlgorithmAssignment3.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o AlgorithmAssignment3.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libAlgorithmAssignment3.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\AlgorithmAssignment3.dir\linkLibs.rsp
